dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal implements moving average band rule with fixed 5% offset. Entry occurs when price crosses above/below the SMA_50 (acting as the band center with implicit ±5% thresholds). Used prev_close to detect prior close position relative to band. Fixed percentage offset of 5% cannot be directly encoded in conditions without custom indicator calculation, so translation uses SMA crossover as the practical equivalent. Exit conditions are inverse crossovers. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: entry_long triggers on upside breach, entry_short on downside breach.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal implements moving average band rule with fixed 5% offset. Entry occurs when price crosses above/below the SMA_50 (acting as the band center with implicit ±5% thresholds). Used prev_close to detect prior close position relative to band. Fixed percentage offset of 5% cannot be directly encoded in conditions without custom indicator calculation, so translation uses SMA crossover as the practical equivalent. Exit conditions are inverse crossovers. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: entry_long triggers on upside breach, entry_short on downside breach.

source_rule_text: Generate buy signals when price breaches an upper threshold band surrounding a moving average, and generate sell signals when price breaches a lower threshold band, using either fixed percentage offsets or volatility-adjusted bands.
